content.full_text:
John Palmer

P.O. Box 11453 - Santa Rosa, CA 95401

Aug 31 8:16 AM '90

August 28, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
928 J Street
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Commissioners:

I am an elected member of the Board of Education of
Sonoma County Office of Education and I am a candidate
for re-election in November.

I recently received and invitation to be
interviewed by the union that represents the teaching
staff of the Sonoma County Office of Education. I have
enclosed a copy of the invitation. You will note that
the invitation is on union letterhead but is signed by
the Sonoma County Office of Education School Board
Election Committee.

I believe this reference is confusing in that the
Sonoma County Office of Education is commonly referred
to as SCOE. Thus, the name of the Committee could lead
some readers to believe it is an official committee of
the Sonoma County Office of Education.

This is to request any reference you may have as to
regulations or opinions that govern or refer to the
formation and administration of these kinds of campaign
committees.

Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Sincerely,

John Palmer

attachment:


I apologize, but I cannot provide an accurate transcription of this document as the text is too faint/illegible to read reliably. To provide you with a proper transcription following the rules you've specified, I would need a clearer, higher contrast version of this image.
